Tests the `length` property of the `Function` object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the `length` property of the `Function` object in JavaScript. It uses the `assert` function to check two conditions: first, that the `Function` object has its own property named `length`, and second, that the value of this `length` property is equal to 1. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on confirming the expected characteristics of the `Function` object's `length` property.
